notes:
- Multi-user: install now auto-adds Content/Python/UEFNBridge/ to the project's .urcignore (Unreal Revision Control - the usual UEFN case), plus .gitignore and .p4ignore, so the bridge's runtime files stop causing source-control conflicts between teammates.
- Runner counts rule-gated jobs as refused, separate from real failures (e.g. 3 done, 2 failed, 5 refused).
- Contract section 8 now documents where AI jobs should write output files: log() or the bridge work folder, never the AI's home dir.
- Includes the v1.7 Copy AI Prompt improvement.
- Build fix: the app now ships with the Visual C++ runtime it needs, so it no longer fails to launch with a python3xx.dll error.

Special notes: PAYLOAD_VERSION is 1.3-bridge, so each project will show "Update Bridge Payload" once after updating the app (that click also writes the .urcignore entry). A project that already committed the bridge folder must be untracked once by hand inside Unreal Revision Control.
